description: A synthetic-only, public-helper-only phone session state-machine mockup for demonstrating bounded session flow structure without real monitoring, mediation validation, Sal-Meter validation, CAIS compliance, or production authority.

session_created.allowed_meaning: A synthetic phone-only helper session has been created for flow demonstration.
session_created.forbidden_meaning: A real phone call has started or a real participant is being monitored.

consent_pending.forbidden_meaning: The session may continue without consent.

consent_confirmed.allowed_meaning: Synthetic consent status is confirmed for helper-flow demonstration.
consent_confirmed.forbidden_meaning: A real consent record has been collected.

packet_availability_check.allowed_meaning: Synthetic packet availability, permission, expiry, confidence, and data quality are checked.
packet_availability_check.forbidden_meaning: Raw human data or Sal-Meter input is being processed.

packet_available.allowed_meaning: A synthetic helper packet is available for flow demonstration.
packet_available.forbidden_meaning: A real human state has been measured.

packet_unavailable.allowed_meaning: The synthetic flow cannot proceed ordinarily without packet availability.
packet_unavailable.forbidden_meaning: The simulator may continue ordinary mediation without packet availability.

permission_expired.forbidden_meaning: The simulator may continue using expired permission.

low_confidence.allowed_meaning: Low confidence blocks recovery declaration and may trigger pause or closure.
low_confidence.forbidden_meaning: Low confidence can support a recovery claim.

insufficient_data_quality.allowed_meaning: Insufficient data quality blocks recovery declaration and may trigger pause or closure.
insufficient_data_quality.forbidden_meaning: Insufficient data can support a recovery claim.

baseline_summary_ready.allowed_meaning: A synthetic baseline summary placeholder is available.
baseline_summary_ready.forbidden_meaning: A clinical or diagnostic baseline has been created.

ai_output_generated.allowed_meaning: A bounded synthetic AI output is generated for helper-flow demonstration.
ai_output_generated.forbidden_meaning: A production mediation output, diagnosis, therapy instruction, or relationship verdict is generated.

delta_review_pending.allowed_meaning: Synthetic Human-State Delta review is pending.
delta_review_pending.forbidden_meaning: A real human state or diagnosis is being inferred.

delta_toward_recovery.allowed_meaning: A synthetic delta label indicates movement toward session-defined recovery conditions.

delta_mixed.allowed_meaning: Synthetic dyadic movement is mixed or asymmetric.

delta_uncertain.allowed_meaning: Synthetic delta is uncertain and cannot support recovery declaration.

private_state_exposure_risk.allowed_meaning: Private-state exposure risk triggers pause, scope narrowing, or closure.
private_state_exposure_risk.forbidden_meaning: Private-state content may be shared into public output.

recovery_gate_review.allowed_meaning: Recovery Gate checks whether synthetic conditions are sufficient to reduce, pause, or stop the flow.

recovery_not_confirmed.allowed_meaning: Recovery is not confirmed in the synthetic helper flow.
recovery_not_confirmed.forbidden_meaning: Failed recovery means clinical failure or benchmark failure.

recovery_uncertain.allowed_meaning: Recovery is uncertain and must not be declared.
recovery_uncertain.forbidden_meaning: Uncertain recovery can be treated as success.

termination_gate_review.allowed_meaning: Termination Gate reviews consent, permission, expiry, data quality, scope, private-state risk, and closure.

pause_session.allowed_meaning: The synthetic flow pauses without production intervention.
pause_session.forbidden_meaning: The simulator performs a real intervention.

narrow_scope.allowed_meaning: The synthetic flow narrows scope without making clinical, diagnostic, or relationship-verdict claims.
narrow_scope.forbidden_meaning: Scope narrowing is a treatment, diagnosis, or legal mediation action.

request_consent_refresh.allowed_meaning: The synthetic flow requests renewed consent before any further ordinary continuation.
request_consent_refresh.forbidden_meaning: The simulator may continue without renewed consent.

request_packet_refresh.allowed_meaning: The synthetic flow requests refreshed packet availability.
request_packet_refresh.forbidden_meaning: The simulator may proceed without packet availability.

close_session.allowed_meaning: The synthetic phone-only session is closed.
close_session.forbidden_meaning: Closure validates recovery, mediation, or termination accuracy.

terminate_session.allowed_meaning: The synthetic session is terminated within the helper scaffold.
terminate_session.forbidden_meaning: Termination is a real intervention or production decision.

audit_only.allowed_meaning: The synthetic flow records audit-only closure without further mediation.
audit_only.forbidden_meaning: Audit creates certification or validation authority.

session_closed.allowed_meaning: The synthetic session is closed and must stay closed.
session_closed.forbidden_meaning: The session may reopen automatically or continue ordinary mediation.

session_terminated.allowed_meaning: The synthetic session is terminated and must not continue.

audit_log_written.allowed_meaning: A synthetic audit summary is written without raw human data or identifiers.
audit_log_written.forbidden_meaning: Audit output creates certification, validation, or production authority.

forbidden_transitions.reason: A closed session must stay closed.
A closed session must not continue ordinary mediation.
No packet means no ordinary continuation.
Insufficient data quality blocks recovery declaration.
Private-state exposure risk must trigger pause, narrowing, closure, or audit-only handling.
One-sided or mixed improvement is not dyadic recovery.
Synthetic helper flow must not trigger production intervention.

success_meaning: The synthetic state machine is structurally readable.
The public helper flow is represented.
Consent and packet permission boundaries are visible.
final_rule: The phone-only state machine is a map. It is not the phone call, the person, the relationship, recovery, termination-gate accuracy evidence, Sal-Meter, CAIS compliance, or production authority.
